phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.cultural_note: The Opera ticket office is near the main entrance on the Place du Casino side.

responses.english: On the Place du Casino, to the right of the entrance.
responses.phonetic: soor lah PLASS doo kah-zee-NOH, ah DRWAHT duh lahn-TRAY
responses.french: Sur la place du Casino, à droite de l'entrée.

phrases.text_local: Quel est le prix des billets ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh pree day bee-YAY
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets range from €30 for upper balcony seats to €200+ for orchestra stalls. Prices skyrocket for premiere performances.

responses.english: It depends on the show. Check at the ticket office.
responses.french: Ça dépend du spectacle. Vérifiez à la billetterie.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are guided tours
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des visites guidées de l'opéra ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day vee-ZEET gee-DAY duh loh-pay-RAH
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours of the opera house are sometimes available outside of performance times.

responses.english: Sometimes, ask at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: par-FWAH, rahn-sayn-YAY voo ah lah bee-yet-REE

phrases.text_local: Quel est le code vestimentaire pour l'opéra ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh kohd ves-tee-mair-TAIR poor loh-pay-RAH
phrases.cultural_note: Evening performances require formal attire. Jackets and ties for men, elegant dresses for women. Matinees are slightly more relaxed.

responses.english: Elegant attire required. No casual clothing.
responses.phonetic: eel foh oon VEST ay oon krah-VAHT poor lay may-SYUR
responses.french: Tenue élégante obligatoire. Pas de tenue décontractée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the doors open
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvrent les portes ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR oo-VRAHN lay PORT
phrases.cultural_note: Doors typically open 30 minutes before the performance. Arrive early to find your seat.

responses.english: Thirty minutes before the show, usually.
responses.phonetic: trahnt mee-NOOT ah-VAHN luh spek-TAHK, ahn zhay-nay-RAL
responses.french: Trente minutes avant le spectacle, en général.
